zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Thornhill於大約1264年出生在英國越可爾恩爾時，她的父親Richard de Thornhill28歲，母親Margaret de Fixby28歲。她於大約1284年與Sir Alexander Swinburne在英國諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1332年之後在英國諾圖波藍德貝維其可-朋-特維德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Thornhill于大约1264年出生在英国越可爾恩爾时，她的父亲Richard de Thornhill28岁，母亲Margaret de Fixby28岁。她于大约1284年与Sir Alexander Swinburne在英国諾圖波藍德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1332年之后在英国諾圖波藍德貝維其可-朋-特維德。

nameMeanings.name: Thornhill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from any of various places called Thornhill, for example in Derbyshire, Yorkshire, Dorset, and Wiltshire, from Old English thorn ‘thorn tree’ + hyll ‘hill’.

variants.name: Thornell
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name composed of the element thorn, an ornamental spelling of torn ‘thorn bush’, + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Thornhill was born about 1264, in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, her father, Richard de Thornhill, was 28 and her mother, Margaret de Fixby, was 28. She married Sir Alexander Swinburne about 1284, in Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 1332, in Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Thornhill est née environ 1264, à Thornhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Thornhill, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Fixby, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Alexander Swinburne environ 1284, à Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1332, à Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Thornhill um 1264 in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard de Thornhill 28 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Fixby 28. Sie hat um 1284 in Northumberland, England Sir Alexander Swinburne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1332 in Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Thornhill è nata il circa 1264 nel Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Richard de Thornhill, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Fixby, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Sir Alexander Swinburne circa 1284, nel Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 1332, nel Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Thornhillが約1264年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒルで生まれた時，父Richard de Thornhillは28歳，母Margaret de Fixbyは28歳であった。約1284年にイギリスノースウンバーランドでSir Alexander Swinburneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1332年以後にイギリスノースウンバーランドバーウィク-ウプオン-トウィードで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Thornhill(이)가 대략 1264년 영국 요르크실르 토른힐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Thornhill(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Fixby(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 대략 1284년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 Sir Alexander Swinburne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1332년 이후 영국 노르스벌랜드 버윅-업-트위드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Thornhill nasceu aproximadamente 1264, em Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Thornhill, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Fixby, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Alexander Swinburne aproximadamente 1284, em Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1332, em Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Thornhill родилась около 1264 г. в местности таурнилл, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard de Thornhill было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Fixby, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Alexander Swinburne около 1284 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1332 г. в местности бирвикк-упон-твид, нортумбирланд, Англия.

sm.about 1264–after 1332: e tusa o le 1264–ina ua ma'ea le 1332

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes Thornhill nació aproximadamente 1264, en Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Thornhill, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Margaret de Fixby, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sir Alexander Swinburne aproximadamente 1284, en Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió después de 1332, en Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
